return(function(O,U,j,d,x,g,K,r,D,P,A,k,t,X,y,W,S,G,b,H,o,N,c,Q)y,S,N,r,t,c,H,G,A,X,k,W,D,P,b,o,Q=function(O,e)local U=X(e)local j=function(j,d,x)return k(O,{j;d,x},e,U)end return j
